MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-09-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Atty. Douglas Akay, Esq., Plaintiff's counsel;
Meagan Mielke, Plaintiff, appearing;
Atty. Cara Mae Acibo, Esq. of Hoge Fenton Jones & Appel, Inc.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD for PLAINTIFF MEAGAN MIELKE.

The matter is called. DISCUSSIONS/ARGUMENT are held. The Court inquires as to whether or not the parties would agree to continue Plaintiff's Motion To Disqualify Arbitrator which is currently on calendar for May 6, 2021. Ms. Acibo argues in opposition to the Court continuing the May 6th motion date. At the conclusion of discussions/argument, the matter is passed to the end of the calendar for the Court to hold an in camera hearing. Ms. Acibo is excused.

At the second call of the matter, the virtual Zoom courtroom is cleared. Court staff, Ms. Mielke and Attorney Douglas Akay are present. The in camera hearing is held.

At the conclusion of the in camera hearing, the Court GRANTED the motion ON CONDITION that Mr. Akay contact opposing counsel to seek a 30-day continuance of the May 6, 2021 motion. Mr. Akay is to make Ms. Mielke aware of the outcome of that request.

Ms. Mielke is informed by the Court that she may be representing herself for the May 6, 2021 hearing.

Mr. Akay is to submit a proposed order on the mandatory judicial council form and is to submit it to the court for review and signature.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/EPS)
